description: READ-ONLY (G9). Full-text + faceted search over government units in the gov-atlas graph (by name, jurisdiction, level, COFOG). Backs civic search at etzhayyim.com — the /actors kotoba-wasm search surfaces ooyake gov units once the gov-atlas-v1 graph is published (R1). Politically neutral, no ranking of governments (G11); never a target-list (G10).

q.description: free-text query over nameLocal / nameEn / nameRomanized

sourcing.description: filter; default returns both but flags representative
